$comment: Sample pg-explain config. Drop a copy named .pgexplainrc.json (or .pgexplainrc) at your repo root, or inline it under a "pgExplain" key in package.json. Every field is optional; anything you omit falls back to the built-in default. Pass --config <path> to point at this file explicitly.

thresholds.$comment: Tune when a rule fires. Values shown are the built-in defaults — edit to taste.

rules.$comment: Per-rule overrides keyed by the PGX_* rule code (see src/advisor/rules/index.ts). Each entry may set { "enabled": false } to silence a rule, and/or { "severity": "error" | "warn" | "info" } to re-rank it.
